name: narrated-video-preflight-fragment
description: Reusable fragment: verify that ffmpeg, ffprobe, say, voice-actuator, and video-composition-actuator are all available before starting a narrated video production pipeline.

params.cmd: command -v ffmpeg >/dev/null && command -v ffprobe >/dev/null && command -v say >/dev/null && test -f dist/libs/actuators/voice-actuator/src/index.js && test -f dist/libs/actuators/video-composition-actuator/src/index.js && echo ok
